data.title_en: What to say if you see someone afflicted by misfortune

items.chapter_title_en: What to say if you see someone afflicted by misfortune
items.arabic_text: ((الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي عَافَانِي مِمَّا ابْتَلاَكَ بِهِ، وَفَضَّلَنِي عَلَى كَثِيرٍ مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ تَفْضِيلاً)).
items.english_text: (All praise is for Allah Who saved me from that which He tested you with and Who most certainly favoured me over much of His creation.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Alhamdu lillahil-lathee AAafanee mimmab-talaka bih, wafaddalanee AAala katheerin mimman khalaqa tafdeela.)
